title: Osmia alternans
intro: Osmia alternans, commonly known as sweet osmanthus or fragrant osmanthus, is a flowering plant species in the family Oleaceae. The health benefits of Osmia alternans include its use as an antispasmodic to alleviate muscle cramps and spasms, as well as its sedative properties to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. Osmia alternans is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat digestive issues, insomnia, and other health conditions.
